---
title: "Phone usage report"
author: "Tianche Cong"
output: html_fragment
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
logged_data <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vR8Y2y-LRMlmleaLxz9OHWzMzTu_2Lv7bv_J9MqsRaTmIMOYU3po8gRomSvXuzSbJtHDBdXinh_sTTV/pub?output=csv")


latest_data <- logged_data %>%
  rename(
    timestamp = 1,
    hours_used = 2,
    main_use = 3,
    before_sleep = 4
  )


```

```{r}
latest_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = main_use)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#aecdd2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Main phone use",
    x = "Type of use",
    y = "Count"
  )

```

```{r}
latest_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = before_sleep)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#cdb4db") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Phone use before sleep",
    x = "Before sleep",
    y = "Count"
  )

```

```{r}
# summary values
mean_hours <- mean(latest_data$hours_used, na.rm = TRUE)
max_hours <- max(latest_data$hours_used, na.rm = TRUE)
min_hours <- min(latest_data$hours_used, na.rm = TRUE)

```

::: dynamic-comment
The average daily phone usage is `r round(mean_hours, 1)` hours.

The maximum recorded usage is `r max_hours` hours, while the minimum is `r min_hours` hours.

This suggests there is variation in daily phone usage behaviour.
:::
